scripts.dev: concurrently -k "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 http-get://127.0.0.1:8765/health && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron .
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && pip install -r requirements.txt
